activities.title: Arrival & Westminster Exploration
activities.description: Arrive at hotel mid-morning. After settling in, explore the Westminster area including Westminster Abbey exterior, Big Ben, and Parliament Square. Evening stroll along the Thames.

activities.title: British Museum & Covent Garden
activities.description: Morning visit to the British Museum (free admission). Explore the Rosetta Stone, Egyptian mummies, and Greek antiquities. Afternoon in Covent Garden for shopping and street performers. Dinner in Soho.
activities.notes: Museum entry free; cost includes lunch and dinner

activities.title: Royal London & Traditional Afternoon Tea
activities.description: Morning visit to Buckingham Palace and St. James's Park. Traditional afternoon tea at The Wolseley on Piccadilly (3:00 PM reservation). Evening walk through Green Park.
activities.notes: Afternoon tea at The Wolseley: £55 (~$70), plus lunch

activities.title: Tower of London & Borough Market
activities.description: Morning at the Tower of London to see the Crown Jewels. Walk across Tower Bridge. Afternoon exploring Borough Market for lunch. Evening free for personal exploration.
activities.notes: Tower of London admission: £34.80 (~$45), plus meals

activities.title: West End Theatre & Leicester Square
activities.description: Leisurely morning in Hyde Park and Kensington Gardens. Afternoon shopping on Oxford Street. Evening West End show - premium seats for 'The Phantom of the Opera' or similar production at 7:30 PM.
activities.notes: Theatre ticket: ~$95, plus dinner in Theatreland

activities.title: South Bank & Tate Modern
activities.description: Morning at Tate Modern (free admission). Walk along South Bank to Shakespeare's Globe Theatre. Afternoon visit to the London Eye (optional). Final evening dinner in Westminster.
activities.notes: Includes lunch, dinner, and optional London Eye ticket

activities.title: Departure Day
activities.description: Morning checkout and last-minute souvenir shopping near hotel. Tube to Heathrow Airport for evening flight. Recommended arrival at airport by 4:20 PM for 6:20 PM flight.
activities.notes: Includes transport to airport and light lunch

input.reasoning: This itinerary successfully meets all requirements within the $4,000 budget. Breakdown: Flights ($1,300), Hotel ($1,110 for 6 nights at a 4-star hotel near Westminster with breakfast included), Activities and meals ($415), with $175 remaining for contingencies, transport, and additional expenses. The Park Plaza Westminster Bridge is ideally located near Westminster attractions and exceeds the 3-star minimum requirement. All must-do activities are included: British Museum visit (Day 2), traditional afternoon tea at The Wolseley (Day 3), and a West End theatre show (Day 5). The itinerary balances iconic London attractions with the specific interests mentioned while staying comfortably under budget.
input.final_message_to_user:
I've created a comprehensive 7-day London itinerary for you that fits within your $4,000 budget!

**Trip Summary:**
- **Flights:** Round-trip British Airways from JFK to Heathrow - $1,300
- **Hotel:** Park Plaza Westminster Bridge (4-star, breakfast included) - $1,110 for 6 nights
- **Activities & Dining:** $415
- **Total Cost:** $3,825 (leaving $175 buffer)

**Highlights:**
✅ Hotel near Westminster with breakfast included (4-star rating)
✅ British Museum visit on Day 2 (free admission)
✅ Traditional afternoon tea at The Wolseley on Day 3
✅ West End theatre show on Day 5
✅ Additional attractions: Tower of London, Westminster Abbey area, South Bank, Tate Modern, and more

Your hotel is perfectly positioned just across from Westminster, within walking distance of Big Ben, Parliament, and the London Eye. Each day is thoughtfully planned to maximize your London experience while keeping costs reasonable. The itinerary includes a mix of free attractions (British Museum, Tate Modern, parks) and paid experiences (afternoon tea, theatre, Tower of London) to balance your budget.

Enjoy your trip to London!
